meaning: adj.声音嘶哑的,破碎的,破裂的
examples: Her lips were dry and cracked.
The ceiling was grey and cracked.
Police have cracked a major drugs ring.
Along with other GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) countries, Bahrain has cracked down hard on internet activism.
"This is like Vegas--we're here all week, " cracked John Taylor, director of public relations at AMD.
